headline: Is It Time To Revisit U.S. Bancorp (USB) After Recent Interest Rate Jitters?
summary: Wondering if U.S. Bancorp at around US$51.16 is still worth your attention, or if most of the value is already on the table? The stock has a 1 year return of 26.6%. In the shorter term, it shows a 1.9% decline over 7 days, an 11.3% decline over 30 days, and a 5.1% decline year to date. Recent headlines around U.S. Bancorp have focused on the broader banking sector's sensitivity to interest rate expectations and investor preference for established lenders. These themes help frame why the...

headline: U.S. Bancorp Taps Alan Flanagan To Shape Global Investment Services
summary: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE:USB) has appointed Alan Flanagan as head of Global Investment Services. Flanagan, a veteran executive with extensive international and asset servicing experience, will oversee global fund services, structured products, and client solutions. For investors watching U.S. Bancorp at a share price of $51.16, this leadership change comes as the company carries a value score of 6 and a 1 year return of 26.6%. The 3 year return of 71.3% and 5 year return of 16.9% provide...

headline: Alan Flanagan joins U.S. Bank as head of Global Investment Services
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, March 17, 2026--U.S. Bank announced today that veteran securities executive Alan Flanagan has joined the bank as head of Global Investment Services, a division comprising Global Fund Services and Global Corporate Trust.
